summary: The diff implements all three requirements for improving UPI payment QR code scannability with a fallback section. REQ-1 is addressed via buildUpiDeepLink() generating a proper upi://pay?pa=...&pn=...&am=...&cu=INR URI. REQ-2 is addressed via buildQrImageUrl() using api.qrserver.com with ecc=H, size=300x300, margin=10, high contrast colors. REQ-3 is addressed via a fallback section with copyable UPI ID, copy confirmation state (copiedUpi), and an 'Open Payment App' deep link anchor. All requirements appear to be implemented.

hallucinated_features.description: A 'copy payment link' button (copiedLink state and handleCopyLink function) that copies the full UPI deep link to clipboard
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-3 only requests a tappable anchor that opens the UPI app when clicked, not a separate copy button for the full deep link. The spec mentions copying the UPI ID with feedback, but not copying the full link.

hallucinated_features.description: A transaction note (tn=Session Booking - Rajats Equation) appended to the UPI deep link
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies the UPI deep link format as upi://pay?pa=...&pn=...&am=...&cu=INR with no mention of a 'tn' (transaction note) parameter.
